<!-- What is the impact of this vulnerability? (e.g., data exposure, privilege escalation, etc.) -->

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (immediate action required)
- [ ] High (urgent action required)
- [ ] Medium (fix in next release)
- [ ] Low (backlog item)

<!-- If you have a suggested fix, please describe it -->

<!-- Any additional context, logs, or evidence -->

## Privacy Note
<!-- This issue will be treated as confidential. Please do not disclose publicly until fixed. -->
